programmes.show_description: Keep Your Frenemies Close. Wes scores another kill, but when a large group enters their camp, tensions flare. Bulent migrates to Seth's watering hole, will the two join forces? S5, Ep8
Third Times The Harm. Wes and the team get their third big-game kill, but the victory quickly becomes a dangerous medical situation. Plus, Bulent is tested by a heat wave. S5, Ep9

Covington Church. The Dawgs work on Covington church and find tambour doors, stairs and a jukebox. Mike and Tay build a locker bench, then the crew finds a propane spotlight. S5, Ep3
Rising Sun Ranch. The Dawgs tackle a ranch house in Alderson, West Virginia. Salvaged items include stained glass and corbels. In the shop, Mike reuses timber to build a beam table. S5, Ep4
Now Or Never. A crushing injury requires Coast Guard rescue. Josh and Casey face a huge loss when their offload gets cancelled, and Monte hauls more crab than the Wizard can hold. S15, Ep22
Cold War Rivals. A dramatic change in the Russian crab industry rocks global markets and sparks new competition. As crab prices grow, legendary captains return to claim their piece. S16, Ep1
Typhoon Hagibis. As the fleet begins its race against the Russians, ferocious typhoon Hagibis hits the Bering Sea. Captains must choose whether to risk their lives for a big payday. S16, Ep2
Honestly Shared. The Misfits discover they're losing precious opal, so they attempt a dangerous night dig with an excavator and ultraviolet blacklights. S6, Ep14
Hard On The Edge. The Bushmen's home-made hoist and bucket fails. The Opal Whisperers, Sofia and Isaac, get trapped at the bottom of their open cut mine in sweltering temperatures. S6, Ep15
The Foreign Claim. Isaac from the Opal Whisperers works an abandoned, dangerous mine. The Mooka Boys are confronted by an irate miner as they peg a claim too close to his mine. S6, Ep16
Red Lead Redemption. Kyle Archer and his team must work an abandoned drive reclaimed by rainforest. Frankie and Ebriony's garnet expedition is cut short by bushfires. S2, Ep7
From The Pinnacle To The Pit. Jarrin and Hugh hunt for anything and everything in the walls of their mine. The Neils risk life and limb against deadly boulders at 'Topaz Mountain'. S2, Ep8
Three groups of sapphire hunters encounter big problems underground. A lack of water, wrong turns and big machines all cause issues for the teams. S1, Ep1
The Dust Devils are poised to smash the biggest season tally ever. The Gold Timers hit paydirt. The Gold Gypsies' gold dream could finally be over. S5, Ep19
The Gold Gypsies have more bad luck. The Victoria Diggers face a death in the family. The Poseidon Crew hope to continue their run of big gold. S5, Ep20
The Dust Devils face a nightmare journey to their remote mining lease. The Ferals are set a huge gold target, and the Poseidon Crew find a nugget. S6, Ep1
Everything Is at Stake. Cheryl's hoarding alienated her family and now threatens her marriage, while single mum Michelle's collecting has reached crisis point. Can they be helped? S1, Ep7
A Million Excuses. Mike and Kim's compulsive shopping has ruined their home and isolated their sons, while Mike's efforts to mask his obsessive collecting as a hobby fools no-one. S1, Ep8
Dog's Spirit In California. Children interact with ghosts and a woman gets one last goodbye from her faithful furry friend. Plus, hundreds of orbs swarm in the moonlight. S7, Ep10
Los Feliz Murder House Part 2. The crew confront a dark presence that haunts an abandoned mansion in LA. They conduct an ancient Sumerian ritual to open gates to the other side. S20, Ep21
Lovelock Triangle. Zak and the crew visit a mysterious Nevada town plagued by paranormal activity. Is a murdered witch's curse responsible for the haunting? S20, Ep22
Burning Inside Out. Ylena's neck painfully dislocates at the slightest movement. Kayla has an extremely rare and painful condition where her arm burns on the inside. S6, Ep1

programmes.show_name: My Body Is Eating My Bones Body Bizarre
programmes.show_description: My Body Is Eating My Bones. Ignacia suffers from a facial tumour that could asphyxiate her. Thomas has a rare bone eating disease that has ruined the left side of his torso. S6, Ep2

What a Dummy. The Baggage Battlers head to a police auction in Stockton, California. There are plenty of valuable items to choose from, including a vintage slot machine. S3, Ep2
Lady Luck. The baggage battlers head to an esteemed estate sale in St. Paul, where they bid on items ranging from automotive parts and a rare doll to a hockey mascot costume. S3, Ep3
Cash Is King. The Baggage Battlers head to London, home to six airports, where Billy, Mark and the Martins compete for the lost and unclaimed bags of the rich passengers. S2, Ep3
California Scheming. The Baggage Battlers wage war at the crazy, eclectic Santa Cruz Lost Property Auction, where Mark brings in reinforcements to battle Billy over antique toys. S2, Ep9
Grand Theft Auto. The Baggage Battlers head to the Tampa Machinery Auction to bid on 1000's of lost or seized vehicles. But will they unearth any gems amongst the lot? S2, Ep10
Eye for an Eye. The Baggage Battlers are in Toronto for one of Canada's largest freight and baggage auctions. Billy makes one of his most shocking discoveries inside his winnings. S2, Ep11
Daredevils. The Baggage Battlers travel to Toronto to bid on international freight and baggage. One of the experts finds an item manufactured by legendary daredevil, Evel Knievel. S2, Ep12
Liar Liar. The Baggage Battlers attend a well-kept secret sheriff's auction in Shreveport, LA. Billy scores a touchdown with his winnings, while a local sheriff interrogates Mark. S2, Ep13
Shock & Awe. The Baggage Battlers heads to the Louisiana Farm auction to bid on Americana collected for over 50 years. Mark misfires when he bids on the wrong item. S2, Ep14
Bad Blood. The Baggage Battlers are back. Today they visit an auction in Red Hook, N.Y., to try to take home a piece of history. Will they succeed? S3, Ep1
Commander In Chief. Wayne's all-original 1954 Studebaker Commander Starliner Coupe is invited to compete in a prestigious car show. And, he gambles on a 1938 Lincoln Model K Coupe. S10, Ep7
Wheels And Deals. Wayne transforms a 1931 Packard 840 Roadster Packard and meets an unexpected buyer. Plus, he loans 'Wheeler Dealers' star Mike Brewer a '57 Ferrari Testa Rossa. S10, Ep8
XKE Marks the Spot. Wayne resurrects a 1962 Jaguar XKE SI 3.8 Flat Floor Roadster that had been hidden for decades. And, he and the crew spruce up an OSCA for an exclusive car show. S10, Ep9
Hurray For Jollywood! Wayne Carini unearths a low-mileage 1965 Shelby GT350, brings a famous 1950's Southern Californian hot rod to auction and is wowed by a Packard. S10, Ep10
Fiberglass, Fiberglass And More Fiberglass. One of Dave's favourite designs is the Mercedes Gul-Wing, and a client has a kit version. But it has many flaws which need addressed. S5, Ep6
The Snowball Episode. A '41 Chevy that has bounced around numerous shops rolls in for a quick trunk lid fix, but the team quickly discover a lot more wrong with the car. S5, Ep7
Green For The Money. Every defect with the Mercedes Gul-Wing has finally been addressed, but questions and challenges remain. Will the client pick Kevin or Dave's vision? S5, Ep8
Supercharged Nova. A classic Nova gets a rebuilt supercharged 6.2 LS, and the crew revives a 1924 LaFrance fire truck for the nearby Cedar Hill Fire Department. S2, Ep3
Laid-Out Dually. Shorty's friend Monty wants to rebuild the car of his youth, an Ember Glow 1955 DeSoto. The car might be pink, but it has a hemi under the hood. S2, Ep4
Jeremy looks at a puzzling military defeat - the Battle of Actium. Next, he examines what could be the first recorded case of a whale rescuing a human. S2, Ep3
Secrets Of The MS Estonia. Jeremy Wade explores the tragic sinking of the cruise ferry MS Estonia. He investigates new footage that casts doubt on the official version of events. S2, Ep4
Dragon's Teeth. Darrell focuses on a multi-million-dollar wreck tied to Sir Francis Drake. He and his team race to locate a treacherous area identified on the map as Dragon's Teeth. S2, Ep5
Island Of Fortune. Darrell and the team head to a mysterious island where they discover valuable clues that lead them closer in the hunt to a 500-year-old shipwreck. S2, Ep6
Monster Of The Amazon. Deep in the Peruvian jungle, a supersized beast is terrifying locals. Jess hunts for evidence that a legendary creature known as Yacumama is on the prowl. S3, Ep11
